issues.detail: The skill does not explicitly handle missing required columns or provide fallback for unsupported file types beyond raising an error.
The skill specifies Python 3.9+ and pandas, limiting compatibility to environments with these dependencies.

scenarios.name: BANT scoring of 30 webinar signups to ranked CSV
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the exact 30/25/25/20 BANT weights, Hot/Warm/Nurture/Cold tiers at 80/60/40 with tier-specific actions, and descending CSV output; baseline uses arbitrary equal weights and non-skill tier labels.

scenarios.name: ICP fit scoring for mid-market SaaS prospects
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses Company Fit weights (Industry 25, Size 25, Geography 15, Tech 20, Revenue 15), tier classification with actions, and explicit deprioritize callouts; baseline sums binary checks without skill-defined weights or actions.
